name: Articulated Dragon
description: A detailed, print-in-place dragon model with fully movable joints and wings. No supports required.

name: Geometric Succulent Planter
description: A modern, minimalist geometric planter perfect for small indoor succulents and cacti.

name: Cyberpunk Cosplay Helmet
description: A multi-part, wearable sci-fi inspired helmet for cosplay. Includes channels for LED wiring.

name: Alchemist's Pocket Watch Display
description: An intricate, mechanical-style display stand designed specifically to hold vintage pocket watches.

name: Moody Desk Headphone Stand
description: A sleek, industrial-style headphone stand that clamps directly to your desk edge.

name: Mechanical Switch Tester
description: A 3x3 grid designed to hold mechanical keyboard switches for testing different tactile feels.
